error_signature: both outputs sent from Switch1 node
title: Unexpected multiple outputs from Switch1 node
symptom: The Switch1 node is sending both outputs instead of just one, causing confusion in the workflow.
applies_when: Node settings configured to Always Output Data
not_this_if: Switch node is used instead of Switch1 node
root_cause: The Switch1 node's setting 'Always Output Data' is enabled, which forces the node to output data even when there is no result, leading to both outputs being sent.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Switch1 node
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Always Output Data' setting in the Switch1 node and save the workflow.
